response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the song title 'Deal with the devil' from the top-left text during the initial performance. 2. Performed a web search for 'Deal with the Devil Tia lyrics' to obtain the lyrics and confirm the original artist as Tia. 3. Mapped the video into three distinct scenes: the song performance (00:00-02:57), the birthday talk segment (02:58-04:21), and the final game segment (04:22-04:57). 4. Compiled the information into the requested JSON format.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a performance of 'Deal with the devil' by the VTuber Aki Rosenthal, followed by a birthday greeting talk segment and a short roulette game.

scenes.description: Aki Rosenthal performs the song 'Deal with the devil' on a stage with backup dancers. The title is shown in the top-left corner.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
One, two, one
Rising, falling, come what will
My hand might be trash, I won’t spill
See who has the stronger mind
Pass your limits and survive!
Can you see it? I can’t tell. Heaven or hell?
In this world there’s just one rule:
Whoever wins, their word will be absolute
A woman needs some resolve
I’ve gotta give him a puzzle to solve
Do what I have to, I’ll even bet my life
Cause’ I’m the all-in gambling queen!
(You can see through me? You doubt me
Thought you had me? Let’s showdown!)
Deal with the devil, I see your lies
No matter the cost, I’ll make you mine
Down to every hair, make you resign
I will own you
A million dollars? I’d say raise
I can’t stop trembling with excitement
C’mon boy, let’s go until I’m spent!
Deal with the devil, oh, I want more!
The endlessly thrilling time in store
I won’t let you touch it, that’s for sure
All this money!
A million dollars? I’d say raise
So come on, hurry, make your mind up!
Until we hit high, don’t you dare stop
Only ever making wishes, you naive baby
No one else can make me feel it
Come give it all to me
Love me, honey
Through your confidential gaze
I can make you show me your ways
Secrets always taste so good
I’ll turn them to, a trap that you can’t avoid
I’ll tempt you, I’ll make you bend
Take time to second guess and it’s the end
This sweet expression, I’ll play innocent as I bring your world crumbling down
(“I can see that you’re bluffing”? You doubt me
Thought you had me? Let’s showdown!)
Deal with the devil
You won’t get past me
No matter how miniscule the cheat
There’s nothing these eyes of mine can’t see
Don’t you get it?
A million dollars? I’d say raise
I want to conquer you completely
Then I’ll love you and you’ll never leave me!
You’re my prey and, there’s no way you’ll ever leave my sight
Wet my lips and call it fate ‘cause
You’re going nowhere my babe
The jack of diamonds! This all has been worth it
I hide my smile, and patiently wait
Can’t see through my poker face, why, it’s perfect!
It never falters, you’ll only end up wasting your time
I feel your gaze on my skin
All the desires that you’re holding in
Why try to save them? You could have so much more
Fun if you’d just come play with me
(So, what, you’re scared to lose? You’re easy game
Thought you had me? Let’s showdown!)
Deal with the devil, I see your lies
No matter the cost, I’ll make you mine
Down to every hair, make you resign
I will own you
A million dollars? I’d say raise
I can’t stop trembling with excitement
C’mon boy, let’s go until I’m spent!
Deal with the devil, oh, I want more!
The endlessly thrilling time in store
I won’t let you touch it, that’s for sure
All this money!
A million dollars? I’d say raise
So come on, hurry, make your mind up!
Until we hit high, don’t you dare stop
Only ever, making wishes, you naive baby
No one else can, make me feel it
Come give it all to me
Love me, honey~

scenes.description: Aki Rosenthal talks to her audience, celebrating her birthday.
Aki Rosenthal engages in a game involving a roulette wheel, which lands on a specific spot.
